title: ficus benguetensis f. urdanetensis
intro: Ficus benguetensis f. urdanetensis, also known as the Urdaneta Benguet Ficus, is a species of fig tree native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and rheumatism due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The Urdaneta Benguet Ficus has been traditionally used to promote overall health and well-being, with reported health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved respiratory function, and enhanced antioxidant defenses. Herbal preparations of Ficus benguetensis f. urdanetensis are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or decocting them in a mixture of herbs, and are consumed orally to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
